title: Mental health productivity crisis — workforce collapse
historical_analogue: Post-COVID mental health crisis, 'Great Resignation', burnout epidemic (2021-2023)
description: A mental health crisis driven by post-pandemic stress, AI disruption anxiety, and social media effects causes measurable productivity collapse. Absenteeism rises 22%. High-skilled workers leave corporate jobs. Knowledge-intensive industries (tech, finance, law) are hardest hit.
